description: Necessary for completeness; being an essential part of a whole. 'Tone' names what cannot be removed without breaking wholeness—the piece that completes.
sound_symbolism: The word connects essentially. 'To' touches with essential contact, part meeting whole. 'Ne' settles with complete belonging, integration achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as adjective: 'tone miona' (integral person). Describes what makes 'noetha' (essential) to a whole. Related to completeness.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Integral being—recognizing oneself as essential part of larger wholes.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Integral systems—understanding how parts connect to create functioning wholes.
